name: Vela, Addie
resolved_employer: Soul Fit Collective (founder / personal trainer & nutrition coach)
evidence: Addie Vela is the founder and trainer of Soul Fit Collective, a one-on-one personal training and nutrition coaching practice based in Austin, TX; her LinkedIn and the firm's site both list her as founder, matching the filing's 'Lead Trainer / Soul Fit Collective' and Austin 78703 location. She gave to Jose 'Chito' Vela III; the shared surname is noted but no family relationship is established by available sources.

evidence: Robert 'RSnake' Hansen, an Austin-based security researcher and executive, joined Tenable as Deputy CTO via its June 2022 acquisition of Bit Discovery (where he was CTO) and ran its EASM/web-app-scanning programs for about a year; the October 2022 gift falls inside that tenure and the filing's 'Deputy CTO / Tenable' plus Austin 78701 match. He has since been CTO at Root Evidence and a venture investor at Grossman Ventures.
